message:
test(conformance): add elf_loader fixture direct execution test

Adds elf_loader_fixture_cases_match_execute_fixture_case test which
executes all 17 cases from elf_loader.json through execute_fixture_case.
Handles mixed expected_output types (strings, integers, JSON objects)
via normalize_expected() helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
